name: OpenFOAM · solidDisplacementFoam (firing evaluation)
description: A reusable OpenFOAM integration node: evaluate ONE ceramic-sintering firing curve with a real solidDisplacementFoam thermo-mechanical run (zirconia 3Y-TZP puck Ø60×12 mm, quarter-symmetry mesh), and extract peak von-Mises stress, soak completeness (min core temperature during the hold), and total cycle time. A COMPOSITE built on the generic `openfoam/run-case` solver: firing-specific case generation (geometry/material/BC) → the generic solve (Docker blockMesh + solidDisplacementFoam + foamToVTK, RAW outputs) → firing-specific extraction + cost/verdict + media-card PNG. Drop it onto any canvas as a sub-workflow node — a constrained-BO loop, a DOE sweep, or a one-shot check. `solver_mode=surrogate` (or `auto` on a Docker-less machine) skips the solve and evaluates a closed-form surrogate calibrated against three cluster-validated runs, so the node works end-to-end without Docker.

pack.name: OpenFOAM Core
pack.description: Core OpenFOAM integration nodes shipped with the platform.
